title: 1248 How To Make An Air Drying Modelling Clay
description:
Clay Recipe
1 to 1/4 cups damp toilet paper
1 cup Ceramic tile adhesive (White)
3/4 cup PVA (Elmer's Glue)
1kg White flour
2 Tablespoons Mineral oil
1 tablespoom White Vinegar


break up toilet paper with food mixer and sqeeze out excess water
mix PVA Oil and Vinegar
Add paper and mix
Add tile adhesive and mix
Add flour mix then knead
to keep - place in oil lined plastic bag, remove air and freeze - will last 2 years easily
water smooth can be sanded when dry
